goal: is_compact[T](s) = forall(x0: Set[T] -> Bool) { is_open_cover[T](x0, s) implies exists(k0: List[Set[T]]) { is_subfamily[T](x0, k0) and s.subset(list_union_of_sets[T](k0)) } }

goal: is_open_cover[T](c, s.union(t)) = (forall(x0: Set[T]) { c(x0) implies T.is_open(x0) } and s.union(t).subset(big_union[T](c)))

p.c: function(x0: List[Set[T]]) { not (is_subfamily[T](c, x0) and s ∪ t ⊂ list_union_of_sets[T](x0)) }(left + right)

function[T0: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[T0]) { forall(x1: Set[T0] -> Bool) { not is_open_cover[T0](x1, x0) or exists(k0: List[Set[T0]]) { is_subfamily[T0](x1, k0) and x0 ⊂ list_union_of_sets[T0](k0) } } = is_compact[T0](x0) }[T](s ∪ t)
not is_compact[T](s ∪ t) or forall(x0: Set[T] -> Bool) { not is_open_cover[T](x0, s ∪ t) or exists(k0: List[Set[T]]) { is_subfamily[T](x0, k0) and s ∪ t ⊂ list_union_of_sets[T](k0) } } = true
(forall(x0: Set[T] -> Bool) { not (is_open_cover[T](x0, s ∪ t) and forall(x1: List[Set[T]]) { not is_subfamily[T](x0, x1) or not s ∪ t ⊂ list_union_of_sets[T](x1) }) or not is_compact[T](s ∪ t) })
(forall(x0: Set[T] -> Bool) { not (is_open_cover[T](x0, s ∪ t) and forall(x1: List[Set[T]]) { not is_subfamily[T](x0, x1) or not s ∪ t ⊂ list_union_of_sets[T](x1) }) })
(forall(x0: Set[T] -> Bool) { not forall(x1: List[Set[T]]) { not is_subfamily[T](x0, x1) or not s ∪ t ⊂ list_union_of_sets[T](x1) } or not is_compact[T](s ∪ t) or not is_open_cover[T](x0, s ∪ t) })
(forall(x0: Set[T] -> Bool) { not forall(x1: List[Set[T]]) { not is_subfamily[T](x0, x1) or not s ∪ t ⊂ list_union_of_sets[T](x1) } or not is_open_cover[T](x0, s ∪ t) })
(forall(x0: Set[T] -> Bool) { not is_compact[T](s ∪ t) or not is_open_cover[T](x0, s ∪ t) or exists(k0: List[Set[T]]) { is_subfamily[T](x0, k0) and s ∪ t ⊂ list_union_of_sets[T](k0) } })
(forall(x0: Set[T] -> Bool) { not is_open_cover[T](x0, s ∪ t) or exists(k0: List[Set[T]]) { is_subfamily[T](x0, k0) and s ∪ t ⊂ list_union_of_sets[T](k0) } })
not forall(x0: Set[T] -> Bool) { not is_open_cover[T](x0, s ∪ t) or exists(k0: List[Set[T]]) { is_subfamily[T](x0, k0) and s ∪ t ⊂ list_union_of_sets[T](k0) } } or is_compact[T](s ∪ t)
